MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-16-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT LUIS ROMERO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT REGARDING WHETHER DEFENDANTS ROMERO AND RIVAS WERE DRIVING THE VEHICLE THAT STRUCK PLAINTIFF AT THE CORNER OF 24TH STREET AND ALABAMA STREET ON JANUARY 14, 2012. MR. MEDINA'S AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANT'S REPLY IS INADMISSIBLE AS IT DOES NOT COMPLY WITH CCP 2015.5. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: LAURA MARTINEZ, CSR #11332

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-16-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LUIS ROMERO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. There is a triable issue of material fact regarding whether Defendants Romero and Rivas were driving the vehicle that struck Plaintiff at the corner of 24th Street and Alabama Street on January 14, 2012. Mr. Medina's affidavit in support of Defendant's reply is inadmissible as it does not comply with CCP 2015.5. Order signed in open court. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332
